source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the circuit shown in figure, it is known that the capacitance of \( C_1 \) is twice that of \( C_2 \). \( C_1 \) is charged to a voltage \( U \), and \( C_2 \) is uncharged. When switch \( S \) is closed, the voltage across \( C_1 \) will become ( )
